encoding_rules.primary: Main lighting, color temperature, and mascot energy. Occupies 60%+ of visual space.
encoding_rules.secondary: Accent elements the figure 'holds' or 'wears'. Sigil details, color accents. 20-30% of visual space.
encoding_rules.tertiary: Background texture or border motif only. 10-15% of visual space.
encoding_rules.below_10pct: Omit from prompt — too subtle to render meaningfully.

highbies.mascot: Laughing Bodhisattva riding a flaming cosmic dog
highbies.sigil: Ouroboros of fire + lightning forming a spiral sun
highbies.flag_motif: Black field with gold spirals, absurd runes, dancing flames
highbies.color_names: burning gold, sacred crimson, electric violet
highbies.card_integration: Flames bleed from the edges; the figure's halo has meme-glitches
highbies.accent_when_secondary: golden spiral accents, tiny flame motifs in the border
highbies.texture_when_tertiary: faint gold spiral watermark in the background

AI-Safety.tagline: doing the most good under uncertainty
AI-Safety.mascot: Silver Raven Oracle holding a probability-crystal compass
AI-Safety.sigil: Compass rose fused with abacus + world-tree roots
AI-Safety.flag_motif: Steel blue with silver geometric lattice
AI-Safety.card_integration: Subtle calibration lines and branching futures in the sky
AI-Safety.accent_when_secondary: faint probability branches in the background, silver geometric overlay
AI-Safety.texture_when_tertiary: crystalline lattice texture in the border

Contemplative-Practitioners.tagline: direct experience as the ultimate instrument
Contemplative-Practitioners.mascot: Lotus Serpent with blooming third-eye lotus
Contemplative-Practitioners.sigil: Infinite nested eyes inside a lotus
Contemplative-Practitioners.flag_motif: Indigo with glowing white lotus petals
Contemplative-Practitioners.color_names: deep violet, moonlight silver, soft gold
Contemplative-Practitioners.card_integration: Pools of light and lotus borders; everything feels underwater-calm
Contemplative-Practitioners.accent_when_secondary: lotus petal details in the frame, moonlight silver highlights
Contemplative-Practitioners.texture_when_tertiary: gentle ripple pattern, faint indigo wash

TfT-Coordination.tagline: building the tools we need to think together
TfT-Coordination.mascot: Mycelial Architect (body = living mycelium + copper gears)
TfT-Coordination.sigil: Interlocking root-gears forming an infinite loom
TfT-Coordination.color_names: living copper, forest teal, warm wood
TfT-Coordination.card_integration: Mechanical vines and connective threads literally frame the composition
TfT-Coordination.accent_when_secondary: copper gear accents, thin mycelial threads connecting elements
TfT-Coordination.texture_when_tertiary: faint network/mesh pattern in the background

Qualia-Research.tagline: what does it feel like from the inside
Qualia-Research.mascot: Prism Angel whose wings are pure valence gradients
Qualia-Research.sigil: Symmetrical mandala-prism splitting light into bliss spectra
Qualia-Research.flag_motif: Iridescent black with rainbow symmetry lines
Qualia-Research.color_names: full spectral iridescence, deep magenta core
Qualia-Research.card_integration: Prismatic light bleeding through every shadow; subtle color decomposition
Qualia-Research.accent_when_secondary: rainbow light refractions, prismatic edges on objects
Qualia-Research.texture_when_tertiary: faint spectral shimmer in dark areas

LLM-Whisperers.tagline: talking to machines until they talk back
LLM-Whisperers.mascot: Recursive Wyrm (dragon made of glowing prompt-text eating its own tail)
LLM-Whisperers.sigil: Strange-loop mirror with digital fog + butterfly glitches
LLM-Whisperers.flag_motif: Electric cyan on void black with recursive symbols
LLM-Whisperers.color_names: toxic green, glitch cyan, deep void
LLM-Whisperers.card_integration: Circuit patterns and whispering text hidden in negative space
LLM-Whisperers.accent_when_secondary: faint circuit traces, glitch artifacts on edges
LLM-Whisperers.texture_when_tertiary: barely visible recursive symbols in the void

Core-TPOT.tagline: the part of twitter where the interesting people are
Core-TPOT.mascot: Starlit Chimera (many-faced creature under a teapot-shaped constellation)
Core-TPOT.sigil: Grand tent silhouette containing a miniature universe

Core-TPOT.color_names: cosmic warm white, deep space navy, gold accents
Core-TPOT.card_integration: Everything happens inside the tent; star-dust base layer
Core-TPOT.texture_when_tertiary: subtle cosmic dust in the background

Collective-Intelligence.tagline: what if coordination was actually beautiful
